prestazioni: VQ35HR (3.5L V6, 24-valve, DOHC) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE Pistons 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a K1 Technologies forged crankshaft for 8,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a GReddy T518Z turbocharger (850cc injectors, AEM 380LPH fuel pump) and a custom-tuned AEM Infinity 7 ECU with flex-fuel capability for E85 blends.

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: Cusco OS Giken 2-way limited-slip differential, Nismo carbon driveshaft, and a Z1 Motorsports 6-speed manual transmission swap (utilizing the CD009 gearbox from the 370Z) with a South Bend Stage 3 twin-disc clutch and lightweight flywheel.

Suspension overhaul with BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear springs) paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), Whiteline adjustable control arms, and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set). Braking upgraded to StopTech ST-60 big brake kit (355mm rotors, 6-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (EX35-specific, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares) paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon Carbon) and a Varis Japan rear diffuser. OEM+ aggressive stance achieved via Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x9.5 +22 front, 19x10.5 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear).

Full interior weight reduction: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses, Takata Drift II steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro 2000, 8-point bolt-in) with carbon fiber door cards (Seibon). Engine bay dressed with a custom carbon fiber strut brace (Cusco) and a titanium bolt kit (ARP) for critical fasteners.

Aero and lighting: Top Secret Japan carbon fiber hood (functional vents for heat extraction), Morimoto XB LED headlights with custom HID projectors (35W, 5500K), and a custom rear wing (Voltex Type 3, 3D-printed aluminum mounts) with Gurney flap. Full vinyl wrap in 3M Matte Military Green with gloss black accents on the roof and pillars.
